label: Interview Show
description: Structure a guest conversation so the strongest insight comes through cleanly and feels easy to publish.
bestFor: Founder interviews, expert guests, and conversational insight-led episodes.
promptHint: Extract the guest's best insight fast, keep the conversation moving, and make the takeaways highly usable.
exampleTitle: What Great Podcast Guests Do Before the Mic Goes Live
exampleDescription: Pull out one strong guest lesson, give it context, and leave listeners with the most useful idea to apply.
